posts.author: ceej (CJ Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m trying to follow the guide here: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360010415539-How-can-I-Import-my-Projects-from-Google-Sheets-

However, there’s no such integration as the one shown in the image. How can I complete this guide? Is this no longer possible?
